# clearpass_role (Data Source)

Manages a user role in ClearPass. Roles are used to define access levels and permissions for authenticated users. Common roles include [Employee], Guest, and custom roles for specific access requirements.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example using the ID of the role
data "clearpass_role" "by_id" {
  id = 12
}

# Example using the exact name of the role
data "clearpass_role" "by_name" {
  name = "[Employee]"
}

output "clearpass_role_by_id" {
  value = data.clearpass_role.by_id.name
}

output "clearpass_role_by_name" {
  value = data.clearpass_role.by_name.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the role.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the role (e.g., 'Guest', '[Employee]', '[Contractor]'). Note: System roles typically use square brackets.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the role's purpose and intended use.
